creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
Alan Somers and I spent a bit of time on this, and from the components
listed for lua 5.1, only alien compiles fine with lua 5.2, all others
break one way or another.

I hope to work a bit more on this over the course of the next days, so
we can get Mk/bsd.lua.mk and lang/lua52 polished a bit.
